title: Crepidium micholitzianum
taxonomy: Crepidium micholitzianum is a species of orchid native to Central America. It is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. More specifically, within the Orchidaceae family, Crepidium micholitzianum is classified as a member of the subfamily Epidendroideae. This subfamily is further divided into several tribes, with Crepidium micholitzianum being a part of the tribe Cranichideae. The classification of Crepidium micholitzianum also includes its genus, which is part of the subgenus Pterichia.
